title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. scardica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. scardica is a sub-species of the kidney vetch plant, a flowering perennial native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating menstrual cramps, and treating wounds, due to its rich content of flavonoids and saponins. Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. scardica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
